# Pull Request Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Description
Please provide a summary of the changes and the problem being solved.

## Governance & Security Checklist (MANDATORY)
- [ ] **Privacy:** I have verified that NO real clinical data, patient identifiers, or hospital-specific info is included.
- [ ] **Hardening:** I have verified that NO secrets, tokens, or credentials are included.
- [ ] **Clean History:** I have checked my commit history for accidental inclusions.
- [ ] **Mocks:** Any data provided for testing is 100% synthetic/mocked.

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] Test A
- [ ] Test B

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Ensure screenshots are using MOCK DATA only.
